_publications._publicationTitle: Combined MEK inhibition and BMP2 treatment promotes osteoblast differentiation and bone healing in Nf1Osx -/- mice.

_contextSnippet: ...callus TV, BV, BV/TV and TMD were significantly higher in Nf1 osx −/− mice treated with the rBMP2+Trametinib combination, compared to vehicle or single drug controls...
details: BMP2+Trametinib combination treatment significantly increased callus TV, BV, BV/TV and TMD compared to vehicle or single drug controls, with higher callus strength and stiffness
